nodes.name: types.py

nodes.languageNotes: Uses typing_extensions.TypedDict to type segment engine metadata payloads.

nodes.name: apps.py
nodes.summary: Django AppConfig for the users app that wires up signal handlers during application startup via its ready hook.
nodes.languageNotes: Lazily imports the signals module inside ready() to register receivers without import-time side effects.

nodes.name: emails.py
nodes.summary: Overrides Djoser's activation and confirmation email classes to use Flagsmith-branded templates.

nodes.name: tasks.py
nodes.summary: Defines the asynchronous task that notifies a user at their previous address when their account email is changed.
nodes.languageNotes: Task is registered with the custom task processor via the @register_task_handler decorator.

nodes.name: send_email_changed_notification_email
nodes.summary: Async task handler that renders the email-updated template and sends a notification to the user's original email address after an email change.

nodes.name: SegmentEngineMetadata
nodes.summary: TypedDict describing segment engine metadata, carrying the segment primary key.

nodes.name: ActivationEmail
nodes.summary: Subclasses Djoser's ActivationEmail to use the Flagsmith account activation template.

nodes.name: ConfirmationEmail
nodes.summary: Subclasses Djoser's ConfirmationEmail to use the Flagsmith account confirmation template.
